CW: Religious oppression & guilt (+ an unhealthy dose of blasphemy & sacrilege), non-consensual themes, mental illness, violence (corporal punishment), homophobia, and Ian.

(also, historical inaccuracy. sorry lol)

‎

‎

The new monk—his laugh during supper, too loud, too bright—had sent Ian fleeing to the latrines, where he'd rutted against the wall until his knees gave out.

His breath came in ragged, not bothering to wiping himself clean. The stain will crust into his habit, another secret to carry to confession.

Not that he'd confess this.

"Forgive me, Father, for I have imagined the Brother bent over the altar, his habit hiked up, those pretty lips around my—"

He snorted.
